
--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{},"pending":[{"id":"1","path":[]},{"id":"2","path":["products"]},{"id":"3","path":["products"]},{"id":"4","path":["products"]},{"id":"5","path":["products"]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"products":[{"__typename":"Consultancy"},{"__typename":"Cosmo"},{"__typename":"SDK"}]},"id":"1"}],"completed":[{"id":"1"}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"lead":{"__typename":"Employee"}},"id":"3","subPath":[0]}],"completed":[{"id":"3"}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"id":1},"id":"4","subPath":[0,"lead"]}],"completed":[{"id":"4"}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"isLeadAvailable":false},"id":"2","subPath":[0]}],"completed":[{"id":"2"}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"derivedMood":"HAPPY"},"id":"5","subPath":[0,"lead"]}],"completed":[{"id":"5"}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql
--graphql--
